com.mentor.chs.plugin

Interface IXApplicationContext

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXBaseApplicationContext, IXBaseContext, IXBaseCurrentContext, IXCurrentContext, IXICDProvider, IXLanguageProvider, IXPrintServiceProvider, IXSymbolLibraryProvider

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXApplicationContext
extends IXBaseApplicationContext, IXBaseContext, IXCurrentContext, IXICDProvider
    This object allows any IXPlugin to have access to a number of very useful objects. For some plugins, like IXAction plugins, the IXApplicationContext object is passed in as a parameter to various methods on the interface. For other plugins, like IXDRCCheck, to gain access to the IXApplicationContext you will need to implement the IXApplicationContextListener interface.

    An IXApplicationContext object can be useful for debugging as it allows plugins to write to the output window of the following applications:

    • Capital Design
    • Capital Logic
    • Capital Integrator
    • Capital HarnessXC
    . To do this, use the IXOutputWindow object returned by getOutputWindow().

    You can also use the IXApplicationContext to gain access to the library objects. An IXDRCCheck can now do additional checks on the library parts used on objects in the design, for example.

    IXApplicationContext is thread safe.

    See Also:
    IXApplicationContextListener, IXOutputWindow

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXBaseApplicationContext

        getApplicationRoot, getOutputWindow, getParentFrame, invokeAction, show

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXBaseContext

        createOptionExpressionParser, createOptionExpressionValidator, getDesignComparisonContext, getLibrary, getXHelper

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXLanguageProvider

        getLanguageManager

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPrintServiceProvider

        getPrintServices

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXSymbolLibraryProvider

        getSymbolLibraries

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXCurrentContext

        getActiveBuildList, getActiveScenarioForDesign, getBridgeContext, getCurrentDesign, getCurrentDiagram, getCurrentProject, getCurrentSBOM, getOpenDiagrams, getSelectedObjects

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXBaseCurrentContext

        getActiveLanguage, getCurrentUser, getSelectedObjects

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.icd.IXICDProvider

        getApplicableICDs, getICDsByNameAndRevision, getICDsByRole
